body_txt: Usually appears in the Harem Genre , and keeps a look out for the major, non-daily disturbances in the household. Outside of that, the cast is on their own. This character is collected and cool as a cucumber, and isn't about to stress about every little thing. They have more fun amusing themselves with the cast's antics. Notable for being probably the only character who will give you a simple straight answer for anything. Usually older than the rest of the cast and (almost) never a romantic possibility (though occasional flirting isn't ruled out). Frequently has a sneaky streak that is not initially obvious and is thus an Unflappable Guardian . Contrast Nerd Nanny . Compare and Contrast to the Top Wife , who will play this role while still being part of the harem.
